datapack.vanillatweaks.advancement.playe: A player will drop their head when killed by another player. The item displays who the killer is (if the killer wasn't invisible).
datapack.bannerflags.advancement.bannerf: §eLets you place banners sideways - like flags!
§eHold §6a stick§e and §6crouch§e next to §6a flag§e to §6§nmake it flip!
datapack.bannerflags.advancement.importa: §eHold §6a diamond§e and §6crouch§e next to §6a flag§e to §6§nmake it big!
datapack.bannerflags.advancement.root.de: Check advancements for feature explanations! - More info @GurkisDev
datapack.bannerflags.advancement.rotatei: §eHold §6a stick in offhand§e and §6crouch§e next to §6a flag§e to §6§nmake it rotate!
datapack.bannerflags.advancement.theflag: §eCrouch place §6a banner on §eany pole block, like §nfences, walls, glass panes, iron bars & more§6 to raise your flag!
All loaded Vanilla Tweaks data packs
datapack.vanillatweaks.advancement.anti_: Prevents endermen from picking up blocks.
datapack.vanillatweaks.advancement.more_: Adds a chance to receive a mob head upon killing it.
datapack.vanillatweaks.advancement.cauld: Drop concrete powder into a cauldron filled with water to instantly harden all of it.
Drop dirt into a water cauldron to instantly convert all of it to mud.
datapack.vanillatweaks.advancement.custo: Ignite nether portals of any shape or size you like, or use crying obsidian in the portal frame.
datapack.vanillatweaks.advancement.fast_: Leaves decay much faster when trees are mined in survival mode.
datapack.vanillatweaks.advancement.mini_: Use a stonecutter to craft certain blocks into mini blocks (heads textured like blocks).
datapack.vanillatweaks.advancement.multi: Not all players in the overworld must sleep to skip the night and the rain.
advancement.dnt.adventure.find_ancient_c: Sneak your way into the Ancient City
advancement.dnt.story.librarian_ancient_: Level up a novice Librarian in the Ancient City Overhaul, then trade for their exclusive book
